ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, THE MOTION HAS BEEN ASSIGNED TO JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE HIGHMAN AND MADE THE FOLLOWING DISCLOSURE. HE HAS A WORKERS' COMPENSATION INSURANCE POLICY WITH STATE FARM. THERE ARE NO CLAIMS PENDING AGAINST THIS POLICY. THAT HE HAS THIS WORKERS' COMP POLICY DOES NOT AFFECT HIS DECISION ON THIS MOTION IN ANY WAY. DEFENDANT FELIX CHING'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED AND WILL TAKE PLACE ON JUNE 23, 2014. MONTEARY SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $520.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED AND PAYABLE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS HEARING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: BRUCE HIGHMAN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Attendance And Testimony At Depo
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALLYSIA D. HOLLAND OF PHILIP M. ANDERSEN & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (925) 225-6838 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The motion has been assigned to Judge Pro Tem Bruce Highman and made the following disclosure. He has a workers' compensation insurance policy with State Farm. There are no claims pending against this policy. That he has this workers' comp policy does not affect his decision on this motion in any way. DEFENDANT FELIX CHING's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Attendance And Testimony At Deposition is Granted and will take place on June 23, 2014. Monteary Sanction in the amount of $520.00 against plaintiff is granted and payable within 30 days of the date of this hearing. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
=(302/JPT)
